local_business.name: Lukas Pub Dance Club
local_business.description: Lokalny pub i klub taneczny w Łomży z karaoke, imprezami weekendowymi oraz szerokim wyborem drinków i przekąsek.

opening_hours_reference.note: Opening hours should be injected dynamically from opening_hours.json once verified.

events_schema.note: Each weekly event should generate an Event schema entry.

menu_schema.note: Menu items can be mapped to MenuItem schema.

seo_meta_defaults.meta_title: Lukas Pub Dance Club | Klub w Łomży
seo_meta_defaults.meta_description: Lukas Pub Dance Club w Łomży – karaoke, imprezy weekendowe, drinki i parkiet taneczny.

agent_instructions: Generate JSON-LD schema in the page <head>.
Use schema.org NightClub type for the venue.
Pull event data dynamically from events.json.
Pull opening hours from opening_hours.json once confirmed.
